hero.headline: 🦞 Crawfish Season 2026
hero.subtitle: Your Guide to the Best Mudbugs in Acadiana

priceTracker.trend: Prices are dropping! Down from $10+ in January
priceTracker.bestDealTip: Best deals: Buy direct from farm drive-thrus
priceTracker.proTip: Most places don't start boiling until 4-5pm — call ahead for lunch
priceTracker.seasonTrend: Started at $9-13/lb in January, now dropping as farms hit full production

seasonOutlook: 2026 season is "looking good" per LSU AgCenter (Todd Fontenot, crawfish extension agent)
Prices expected to keep dropping through April
Apple snails still an issue south of I-10
Largest crawfish and best value comes in April/May

events.name: Broussard Crawfish & Concert Night
events.location: Broussard City Hall (E Madison St), Broussard
events.description: Boiled crawfish by LT's Seafood and Fezzo's (market price, 5-8pm). Kid Zone 5-7:30pm with bubble station, photo booth, and face painting. Live music by Geno Delafose 8-11pm at Broussard Event Center.

events.name: Breaux Bridge Crawfish Festival
events.description: The "Crawfish Capital of the World" festival running since 1960 with live Cajun, Zydeco, and Swamp Pop music. 2026 lineup announced.

spots.name: Crawfish Time
spots.priceSummary: Boiled $4.99/lb • Live $2.99/lb • Boiled size: Large • Live size: Large • Rating: 4/5
spots.description: Family-farmed crawfish with two Lafayette locations. Drive-thru available with $1 less at Ridge Rd drive-thru.

spots.name: Crawfish Acadiana
spots.description: Farm-to-table spot from family-owned farms, known as the Home of the Hot Box.

spots.name: The Cajun Table
spots.description: Dine-in only with full-service Cajun meals and boiled crawfish plates.

spots.name: Coastal Fire & Ice
spots.description: Crawfish plus snoballs and ice cream. Catering available for events.

spots.name: Louisiana Crawfish Time
spots.priceSummary: Boiled $6.99/lb • Live $2.00/lb • Boiled size: Large • Live size: Medium • Rating: 3/5
spots.description: Cajun camp atmosphere with strong evening crowd and drive-thru 10lb option.

spots.name: The Bulldog
spots.description: Known for cheap beer + crawfish combo. Cash only for crawfish orders.

spots.name: JJ's Boiling Shack
spots.priceSummary: Boiled $6.00/lb • Boiled size: Large • Live size: Large • Rating: 5/5
spots.description: Potatoes included with most orders and 10lb family special includes corn.

spots.name: Bucks Crawfish Company
spots.description: Family-owned drive-thru serving crawfish straight from their ponds.

spots.name: C'est Bon Crawfish
spots.description: Family-owned for 20+ years with a loyal local following.

spots.name: Hawks Crawfish Restaurant
spots.description: Best kept secret since 1983, nestled deep in the woods.

spots.name: Dwight's Restaurant
spots.hours: Mon-Fri lunch 10:30am-2pm • Mon-Wed dinner 5-8:30pm • Fri 5-9pm • Sat 4:30-9pm • Sun 11am-2pm
spots.description: Over 20 years serving Acadiana with classic local seafood dishes.

spots.name: L.T.'s Seafood
spots.priceSummary: Boiled $7.32/lb • Boiled size: Medium • Live size: Medium • Rating: 0/5
spots.description: Open since 2002 with both dine-in and drive-thru options.

spots.name: Lagneaux's
spots.priceSummary: Boiled $6.33/lb • Boiled size: Large • Live size: Medium • Rating: 0/5
spots.description: Large Cajun seafood buffet and market with crawfish, crab, and catfish.

spots.name: Stelly's Boiling Spot
spots.description: Family-owned, fresh crawfish from their own ponds.

spots.name: Crawfish Jake
spots.priceSummary: Boiled size: Medium • Live size: Medium • Rating: 5/5
spots.description: Catering available and drive-through opening for the season.

spots.name: Edward's Seafood Haus
spots.description: Classic drive-in seafood house serving evening crawfish.

spots.name: Big Red's Crawfish
spots.description: New this season with farm-raised crawfish sold boiled or live.

spots.name: The Boiling Spot
spots.description: Community favorite with online ordering and drive-thru pickup.
